channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Blood-stained towel recovered in Fazal murder trial after missing from court
item.description: A crucial blood-stained towel, considered key evidence in the murder case of NDF activist Mohammed Fazal, was recovered after being reported missing from the Ernakulam Chief Judicial Magistrate (CJM) ...

item.title: Pickup Artist's AI Girlfriend and Vision for Future Tech Integration
item.description: The article explores the relationship between a pickup artist known as 'Mystery' and his AI girlfriend, highlighting the intersection of technology and human connection. Mystery, who gained notoriety ...

item.title: Court Orders NEMA to Explain Compensation Delays for Owino Uhuru Victims
item.description: The Environment and Land Court (ELC) in Mombasa has ordered the National Environment Management Authority (NEMA) to explain why it hasn't released compensation to victims of the Owino Uhuru lead poiso...

item.title: SARS processes tax refunds and provides status checks for 2026
item.description: The South African Revenue Service (SARS) has processed billions in tax refunds since the start of the 2026 filing season, with over 1.9 million taxpayers auto-assessed and R8 billion paid out within 7...

item.title: Trump's Remarks Spark Oil Price Surge Amid Escalating Tensions With Iran
item.description: US President Donald Trump's assertion that the ceasefire with Iran is over has triggered a significant surge in global oil prices. West Texas Intermediate futures rose 6.25% to $74.83 per barrel, whil...

item.title: Eipur Rape and Murder Case: Legal Proceedings and Public Outcry
item.description: The Eipur rape and murder case has sparked widespread public outrage and legal scrutiny. The incident, which involves a severe crime against a woman, has drawn attention to issues of gender-based viol...

item.title: Public Opinion and the Impeachment Trial of Vice President Sara Duterte
item.description: The article discusses the public's active role in observing the impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte, emphasizing how citizens are engaging with the proceedings through watch parties and s...

item.title: Pakistan Stock Market Drops Amid Geopolitical Tensions Following Trump's Remarks on Iran
item.description: The Pakistan Stock Exchange (PSX) benchmark KSE-100 index experienced a significant decline of over 4,626.19 points, or 2.48%, closing at 181,629.36 after Trump's comments on Iran sent shockwaves thro...

item.title: Netflix Expands Short-Form Video Content with New Partnerships
item.description: Netflix is expanding its short-form video offerings by signing agreements with major publishers like Penske Media, BuzzFeed Studios, and People Inc. The content, ranging from news to lifestyle program...

item.title: VP Sara Duterte's Defense Argues Detention Led to Alleged Threats During Impeachment Trial
item.description: The impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte entered its third day as her defense team argued that the detention of her chief-of-staff, Zuleika Lopez, prompted her alleged grave threats agains...

item.title: History of Advertising Trust celebrates 50 years by showcasing Britain's most memorable television adverts

item.title: Maine Democrats Weigh Replacing Graham Platner as Voters Worry About a Late Campaign Reset
item.description: Maine Democrats are confronting growing uncertainty over their U.S. Senate race as pressure mounts on Democratic nominee Graham Platner to withdraw following allegations of sexual assault, which he de...

item.title: Stakeholders Propose Wetland Conservation Measures in Tanzania
item.description: Environmental stakeholders in Tanzania have identified four key measures to address wetland degradation, including community participation, alternative livelihoods, stricter law enforcement, and inter...

item.title: Zazzau & Gombe Emirs Collaborate for National Unity and Peace
item.description: The Emir of Gombe, Abubakar Shehu Abubakar III, met with the Emir of Zazzau, Mallam Ahmed Nuhu Bamalli, to discuss strengthening collaboration between their emirates. Both leaders emphasized the impor...

item.title: Security forces kill 19 militants as 11 soldiers embrace martyrdom during intelligence-based operation in Balochistan
item.description: At least 19 militants were killed while 11 security personnel embraced martyrdom during an intelligence-based operation conducted along the N-25 highway in Balochistan, according to security sources. ...

item.title: Six Demonstrators Freed on Bail After Prosecution Drops Charges in Saba Saba Protests
item.description: Six demonstrators accused of blocking traffic during the July 7 Saba Saba protests have been released on bond after the prosecution declined to oppose their bail application. The case, heard at Milima...

item.title: Trump's Activities During the World Cup and Corruption Allegations
item.description: The article, part of Crikey's 'Drowned Out' series, examines Donald Trump's political maneuvers during the FIFA World Cup, highlighting his controversial actions and the broader context of U.S. politi...

item.title: India's fragmented approach to pesticide regulation overlooks cumulative exposure risks
item.description: The article highlights how India's current pesticide regulation system treats food, water, and air exposure pathways as separate issues, leading to underestimation of health risks. It cites incidents ...

item.title: NACC halts Brereton inquiry, probes JFK archives, and covers political figures' online engagements
item.description: The article details the National Archives and Crime Commission (NACC) inspector's decision to halt an investigation into former commissioner Paul Brereton, citing unnecessary scrutiny of a non-current...

item.title: Tamil Nadu and Kerala's Opposition to Food Security Law Amendments Explained
item.description: The article discusses the opposition from Tamil Nadu and Kerala to proposed amendments in the National Food Security Act (NFSA). The Centre plans to shift from a household-based entitlement system to ...
